supersedes: the gate/publish block formerly inside recipes/consolidation-v1.0.json
note: Publish policy, NOT a training knob. policy_id is recorded in every gate report and must never enter a cycle stage key: deciding what is good enough to ship must not re-train anything.

gate.traps_note: was 0.40, which blocked 71% of the reference recipe's own nights. Reference night-to-night sd (0.090) equals binomial noise at n=28 (0.090), so at this suite size the metric measures only sampling. 0.15 => 0.9% false-block, 98.8% collapse detection. Raise to 0.25 when the suite reaches ~150 probes.

heldout.note: was a fixed 0.05 ceiling on 60 probes — 12% power against 2% contamination while sitting two probes from a false block. Now a one-sided exact test against the run's OWN base control over all 222 probes; the backstop covers a base model that is itself contaminated, where the differential test would see nothing.

gate.min_probes_note: the harness supplies exactly 60 + 60 + 28; the old floor of 150 was unpassable by construction.
